message.content:
@startuml

package "com" {
  package "cmput201f10t09" {
    package "vibes" {
      package "dialogs" {
        class MoodFilterDialog
      }

      class SplashActivity
      class LoginActivity
      class SignUpActivity
      class MainActivity

      interface Observer

      package "models" {
        class UserManager
        class Event
        class User
        class MoodEvent
        class EmotionalState
      }

      abstract class Observable

      package "fragments" {
        package "editfragment" {
          class ImageAdapter
          class EditFragment
        }

        package "profilefragment" {
          class ProfileFragment
        }

        package "mooddetailsfragment" {
          class MoodDetailsDialogFragment
          class MoodDetailsFragment
        }

        package "followingfragment" {
          class FollowingFragment
          class FollowingFragmentAdatper
        }

        package "mapfragment" {
          class MapFragment
          class MapFilter
          class UserPoint
        }

        package "moodlistfragment" {
          class MoodListFragment
          class MoodListAdapter
          class MoodListFilterFragment
          interface MoodListFilterListener
          class FollowedMoodListAdapter
          class OwnMoodListAdapter
          class MoodListFilter
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

' Observable and Observer
Observable <|-- UserManager
Observer <|.. MainActivity

' models relationships
Event <|-- MoodEvent
MoodEvent "0..*" --* User
EmotionalState <|-- MoodEvent

' SplashActivity relationships
SplashActivity --> MainActivity
SplashActivity --> LoginActivity

' LoginActivity / SignUpActivity
LoginActivity --> MainActivity
SignUpActivity --> MainActivity

' MainActivity relationships
MainActivity "1" o-- "0..1" EditFragment
MainActivity "1" o-- "0..1" ProfileFragment
MainActivity "1" o-- "0..1" MoodListFragment
MainActivity "1" --> FollowingFragment
MainActivity "1" --> MapFragment
MainActivity "1" --> MoodDetailsFragment

' ImageAdapter
ImageAdapter "1" --* EditFragment

' ProfileFragment
ProfileFragment "0..1" o-- "0..1" MoodDetailsFragment

' MoodDetailsFragment / MoodDetailsDialogFragment
MoodDetailsDialogFragment --> MoodDetailsFragment

' FollowingFragment
FollowingFragment <|-- FollowingFragmentAdatper

' MapFragment
MapFragment "1" o-- "0..*" UserPoint
MapFragment "1" --> "1" MapFilter

' MoodListFragment
MoodListFragment "0..1" o-- "1" MoodListFilterFragment
MoodListFragment "1" --> "1" MoodListAdapter

' MoodListAdapter
MoodListAdapter <|-- FollowedMoodListAdapter
MoodListAdapter <|-- OwnMoodListAdapter

' MoodListFilterFragment
MoodListFilterFragment "1" o-- "0..1" MoodListFilter
MoodListFilterFragment ..|> MoodListFilterListener

' MoodFilterDialog
MoodFilterDialog --> MoodListFilterListener

' User relationships
User --> UserManager
UserPoint --> User

' MoodListAdapter uses MoodEvent
MoodListAdapter --> MoodEvent

' MoodListFragment uses MoodListFilterListener
MoodListFragment --> MoodListFilterListener

@enduml
